name: Virtusa Corporation
description: Virtusa Corporation is a global information technology services company headquartered in Southborough, Massachusetts. Founded in 1996, the company provides a comprehensive range of services, including IT consulting, business consulting, and outsourcing. Virtusa specializes in digital strategy, engineering, and automation, serving Global 2000 enterprises across various industries such as banking, financial services, insurance, healthcare, and telecommunications. By leveraging domain-driven solutions and advanced technology, Virtusa helps organizations reimagine their business models, accelerate growth, and achieve sustainable digital transformation on a global scale.
